patient_summary:
• 73/F patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus
• Key Procedures: Procedure at LGH KISSEL HILL (08/18/2025)
• Active Meds: 1 medication including Atorvastatin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Glucose 199 (H) 01/11/2021
• Key History: Former smoker (cigarettes 03/22/1971-03/22/1973)
